{{Shell
|name=King's New Clothes
|image=King's New Clothes.png
|description=If you don't see anything after putting it on, then you are a fool. This is the most beautiful outfit in the world.
|affct=ART
|hard=RUSH
|source=[[Altar#One_time_wishes|Dragon Wish "I'm done being a snail!"]]
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Dragon
|element=Wind
|realm=Cathay
|orangehard=ATK 
}}
